image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, recording, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S031. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder playing, with a red mug nearby.; The voice of a younger, more fearful Lin Che emanates from the recorder. narration intent: Narrator explains "The recorder plays Lin Che's own voice, younger and more afraid.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A (younger, recorded) says "If I forget, start from the red mug.". shot positive notes: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder on a wooden table, red mug beside it, warm dim kitchen lighting, nostalgic atmosphere, shallow depth of field, film grain.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, recording, must remain visually consistent. shot S031. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder playing, with a red mug nearby.; The voice of a younger, more fearful Lin Che emanates from the recorder. narration intent: Narrator explains "The recorder plays Lin Che's own voice, younger and more afraid.". dialogue mood: Protagonist A (younger, recorded) says "If I forget, start from the red mug.". shot positive notes: Close-up of a vintage tape recorder on a wooden table, red mug beside it, warm dim kitchen lighting, nostalgic atmosphere, shallow depth of field, film grain.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, modern elements, bright colors., face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: The recorder plays Lin Che's own voice, younger and more afraid.

dialogue.speaker: Protagonist A (younger, recorded)
dialogue.text: If I forget, start from the red mug.

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
